name: Scaffold Inspection Tag
shortDescription: Rewritable status tag confirming a scaffold has been inspected and is safe to use.
longDescription: A larger-format rewritable tag purpose-built for scaffold and equipment inspection status — 'Ready to Use' / 'Under Construction' / 'Do Not Use' status fields with space for inspector name, date and remarks, so anyone approaching a scaffold can see its current status at a glance. A matching ABS tag holder is available for permanent mounting at the access point.

images.alt: Scaffold Inspection Tag supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Status fields
specs.value: Ready to Use / Under Construction / Do Not Use
